question:
You must keep shipping papers describing hazardous materials ______.
1) in a pouch on the driver's door or in clear view within immediate reach while the seat belt is fastened while driving on the driver's seat when out of the vehicle
2) in a pouch on the drivers door or in the overhead compartment above the driver's seat only
3) None of these
4) within 100 feet of the hazardous materials at all times
5) with the bills of lading
canonical_answer: in a pouch on the driver's door or in clear view within immediate reach while the seat belt is fastened while driving on the driver's seat when out of the vehicle

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: in a pouch on the driver's door or in clear view within immediate reach while the seat belt is fastened while driving on the driver's seat when out of the vehicle

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Test Nj
appears_in.answer: in a pouch on the driver's door or in clear view within immediate reach while the seat belt is fastened while driving on the driver's seat when out of the vehicle
